title: Choose Instructions, Skills, Plugins, Hooks, or MCP · Transfer Build
summary: Route recurring agent needs to the smallest durable extension surface. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of an extension-surface decision matrix with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate one-turn prompts, repository instructions, reusable skills, enforcement hooks, plugins, and external tools by scope.
Use AGENTS.md or equivalent repository guidance for durable local conventions.
Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Defend the transferred model

steps.why: Retrieving Plugin Fit through the concrete an extension-surface decision matrix case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use a plugin to distribute skills, connectors, hooks, and presentation assets as one installable unit.
